creator: oliver@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

I agree with you that this is a bit inconsistent and this had been done right in the first place when the port was created. 
But changing it now - I fear to much problems which may occur by very less gain on th eother hand and this is why I'll not change the package name. 

http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=139483
